summary.en: Tuvalu uses AS/NZS 3112 Type I domestic socket-outlets in ordinary premises, while a forward-looking public EV charging deployment would follow the IEC market direction: IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 61851 conductive charging requirements. Connector conformity should be confirmed in the Department of Energy, TEC, donor-funded tender, site-owner, or charge-point-operator specification for each project, but China GB/T connector hardware is physically incompatible with the IEC Type 2 ecosystem.
summary.zh: 图瓦卢普通场所采用AS/NZS 3112 Type I家用插座，而前瞻性的公共电动汽车充电部署将遵循IEC市场方向：交流充电采用IEC 62196 Type 2，并适用IEC 61851传导式充电要求。每个项目应在能源部、TEC、捐助方资助招标、场地方或充电点运营商规范中确认接口符合性，但中国GB/T接口硬件与IEC Type 2体系在物理上不兼容。
summary.zht: 圖瓦盧普通場所採用AS/NZS 3112 Type I家用插座，而前瞻性的公共電動汽車充電部署將遵循IEC市場方向：交流充電採用IEC 62196 Type 2，並適用IEC 61851傳導式充電要求。每個項目應在能源部、TEC、捐助方資助招標、場地方或充電點運營商規範中確認接口符合性，但中國GB/T接口硬體與IEC Type 2體系在物理上不兼容。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 3112 — Plugs and socket-outlets, Type I domestic ecosystem
IEC 62196-2 — AC Type 2 coupler dimensional compatibility
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 CAN communication. GB/T AC connector geometry, gender, signaling, and contact arrangement differ from IEC 62196 Type 2, and GB/T DC couplers are not CCS2. GB/T charger hardware therefore cannot be treated as a connector-compatible substitute for Tuvalu IEC deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930 CAN通信。GB/T交流接口在几何、接口性别、信号和触点排列方面不同于IEC 62196 Type 2，GB/T直流耦合器也不是CCS2。因此GB/T充电桩硬件不能作为图瓦卢IEC部署的接口兼容替代品。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。GB/T交流接口在幾何、接口性別、信號和觸點排列方面不同於IEC 62196 Type 2，GB/T直流耦合器也不是CCS2。因此GB/T充電樁硬體不能作為圖瓦盧IEC部署的接口兼容替代品。

gap.en: Conversion from GB/T to Tuvalu IEC Type 2 deployments requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable, locking system, proximity-pilot and control-pilot circuits, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, and any required IEC 61851 communication behavior. Adapters should not be treated as a project-compliant substitute. Domestic AS/NZS 3112 Type I sockets do not make GB/T EVSE connector hardware compatible with public IEC Type 2 charging.
gap.zh: 从GB/T转换为图瓦卢IEC Type 2部署，需要重新设计耦合器、电缆、锁止系统、接近导引和控制导引电路、标签、温升证据、备件，以及任何所需的IEC 61851通信行为。转接器不应作为项目合规替代方案。家用AS/NZS 3112 Type I插座并不使GB/T充电设备接口硬件兼容公共IEC Type 2充电。
gap.zht: 從GB/T轉換為圖瓦盧IEC Type 2部署，需要重新設計耦合器、電纜、鎖止系統、接近導引和控制導引電路、標籤、溫升證據、備件，以及任何所需的IEC 61851通訊行為。轉接器不應作為項目合規替代方案。家用AS/NZS 3112 Type I插座並不使GB/T充電設備接口硬體兼容公共IEC Type 2充電。

mandatory_status.target: Forward-looking requirement where IEC 62196 Type 2 is specified by DoE, TEC, donor-funded tender, site-owner, or CPO requirements; GB/T substitution is not physically compatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

source.publisher: Tuvalu Department of Energy, Ministry of Public Utilities and Infrastructure

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tuvalu IEC Type 2 deployments require connector hardware and protocol redesign for GB/T chargers. Domestic AS/NZS 3112 Type I socket use does not make Tuvalu a China GB/T EV connector market, and GB/T connectors cannot be accepted as plug-compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 图瓦卢IEC Type 2部署要求GB/T充电桩进行接口硬件和协议重新设计。家用AS/NZS 3112 Type I插座使用并不表示图瓦卢属于中国GB/T电动汽车接口市场，GB/T接口不能视为插接兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 圖瓦盧IEC Type 2部署要求GB/T充電樁進行接口硬體和協議重新設計。家用AS/NZS 3112 Type I插座使用並不表示圖瓦盧屬於中國GB/T電動汽車接口市場，GB/T接口不能視為插接兼容。
